Almighty Vice Lord Nation.description: The Almighty Vice Lord Nation is the second-largest street and prison gang in Chicago, founded in 1957 by African American youths at the Illinois State Training School for Boys. It is a founding member of the People Nation alliance and engages in drug sales, robbery, extortion, and murder. The gang attempted to soften its image in the 1960s as Conservative Vice Lords Inc., but continued criminal activities. It remains active with an estimated 30,000-35,000 members across 28 states.

descriptions: The 14th Street Clovers evolved into the Vice Lords.

Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi.description: The Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi is a yakuza organization based in Hyogo, Japan, formed in 2015 after breaking away from the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi. It was founded by Kunio Inoue and initially had 2,800 members, but membership declined to 140 by 2023 due to splits and disbandments. The group is designated as a crime syndicate by Japanese authorities and is involved in various criminal activities.

Cornbread Mafia.description: The Cornbread Mafia was a group of Kentucky men who created the largest domestic marijuana production operation in U.S. history, based in central Kentucky. Founded in the late 1970s by Joe Keith Bickett and others, the group operated across 30 farms in 10 states. The term was first used publicly by federal prosecutors in 1989, and the group was dismantled in the late 1980s with 70 members arrested.

descriptions: The text states that the Dixie Mafia is also known as the Cornbread Mafia, indicating they are the same organization.
edges.evidence_quote: It also goes by the name The Cornbread Mafia.

Independent Cartel of Acapulco.description: A Mexican criminal gang based in Acapulco, Guerrero, formed in 2010 as a split-off from the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel after the death of Arturo Beltrán Leyva. Known for extreme violence including flaying victims, and involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and murder. The group was active until around 2014, when it faded from public view after leadership arrests.

The Base.description: The Base is an international neo-Nazi organization and paramilitary training network formed in 2018 by Rinaldo Nazzaro. It advocates accelerationist and white nationalist ideology, aiming to overthrow governments and establish white ethnostates. The group operates in multiple countries and has been designated as a terrorist organization by several nations and the European Union.
